params.name: Racky's Head
params.description: This unrecognizable head once belonged to War God, one of the eight Demon Gods. With his extraordinary intelligence and devotion to studying technology, he had crafted a set of powerful arms. Yet he was defeated by the snail, and his head became part of the snail's collection.
